name: update_issue
description: Update properties of an existing Linear issue. You can change the title, description, status, priority, assignee, labels, project, and more. Only the fields you include in the input will be modified. Requires the issue's UUID.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: GraphQL mutation string to update an issue.
parameters.example: mutation { issueUpdate(id: "issue-uuid", input: { stateId: "state-uuid" }) { success issue { id identifier title state { name } } } }

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The UUID of the issue to update.

parameters.name: description
parameters.example: Updated description with root cause analysis.

parameters.name: stateId
parameters.description: UUID of the workflow state to transition the issue to (e.g., 'In Progress', 'Done').

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: New priority level: 0 = No priority, 1 = Urgent, 2 = High, 3 = Medium, 4 = Low.

parameters.name: assigneeId
parameters.description: UUID of the user to reassign the issue to.

body.query: mutation IssueUpdate($id: String!, $input: IssueUpdateInput!) { issueUpdate(id: $id, input: $input) { success issue { id identifier title state { name } priority assignee { name } updatedAt } } }
